case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PEDRO HENRIQUE SOARES MENDONCA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $516.58 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDONCA, PEDRO HENRIQUE SOARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00- SERVED DEC-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDONCA, PEDRO HENRIQUE SOARES
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/27/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDONCA, PEDRO HENRIQUE SOARES $516.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $596.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT PEDRO HENRIQUE SOARES MENDONCA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
